Name: Black Trilobite
Description: This shadow-colored crawler is like the common variety, except it has a shell that’s blacker than the darkest caves in the jungle. It crawls across the muddy silt of the underground jungle with its heavy obsidian-like shell to keep it safe from the massive predators in the jungle. Just like its cousin, landing this catch will be a slow, heavy fight against a living tank that’s been around since the dawn of time.
